paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is currently 6.45, with a change of -2.05% compared to the prior close and -25.83% over the last 22 trading sessions. The price is as of July 23, 2026.

Fermi Inc. has a total of 25 filings in the feed, including 1 Form 4 filing and 17 proxy solicitation filings.
